styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents, enclosed room, full centered shuttle, full launch stack portrait, second worker, giant hero monitor, smiling portrait

cases.prompt_body: High launch-tower service level before dawn, one engineer proxy in a weather jacket stands at a side-mounted terminal inside open steel, only the rust-orange external tank shoulder and one white booster slice appear beyond the structure, terminal screen unreadable and dim, catwalk altitude obvious, cold damp air, sodium work lights, restrained documentary tension

Open launch tower catwalk with one lone technical worker paused at a waist-high console, the worker reads clearly as inside the tower rather than in a room beside it, only a partial tank and booster slice remain visible through the lattice behind him, no full shuttle hero, unreadable terminal glow, misty blue cold, quiet procedural stillness

Side-profile warning shot on an elevated launch-tower platform, one engineer proxy at a compact terminal with hands near the keys, the tower structure dominates and the Challenger hardware stays subordinate as a partial background slice only, open air and height are obvious, no second worker, no office bay, restrained prelaunch cold
